calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Proof Of Case Intiation In San Diego

Petition To Establish, Join, And Fund A Sub-Account For Angelina Carter Into The California Charities Pooled Special Needs Trust; To Set Bond; To
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for status hearing for petition to establish, join, and fund a sub-account for Angelina Carter, et. al.

Dept. 204; Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputy Musto; Not reported

Petitioner Margarita Spataro represented by Jessica Jones, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.

Court has reviewed moving papers and addresses trust fees.
Petition to Establish, Join, and Fund a Sub-Account for Angelina Carter into the California Charities Special Needs Trust, et. al. is GRANTED IN PART. Request for trustee fees is DENIED. The matter is taken under submission.

Court orders matter continued to Mar-02-2027 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 for proof of case initiation in San Diego. Court to issue order.
